tools_used: direct fetch of supremecourt.gov order-list PDFs
helpful: statpack modern-cert, relist, and per-Term tables as calibration anchors
provisioned petition.txt and questions-presented.txt (no fetching needed)
supremecourt.gov order-list PDFs for verifying companion-petition dispositions
gaps: CourtListener MCP daily quota (1200/day) was already exhausted at first call — per-cell or per-run quota partitioning would help
fedcourts query has no free-text/subject search on SCOTUS rows, so issue-similar priors (vaccine-mandate cert denials) cannot be retrieved from the corpus
statpack carries no CFR (call-for-response) cut, which was the pivotal docket signal here; a cfr bucket beside relist/CVSG would anchor cases like this
no salience-band table in the current statpack despite the prompt describing one
notes: Web search result summaries misreported 25-765 as granted; verifying against the order-list PDF was essential. Companion-docket status lookups were the decisive retrieval this run.
